basic_details.short_information: The Health & Family Welfare Department, Punjab, Chandigarh has issued Recruitment Notice Reference No. E4/(4)/pb./2026/3954 dated 07-07-2026 for the post of House Surgeon. The recruitment is being carried out under the National Health Mission (NHM) Punjab, and candidates must apply online within the specified window.

content_sections.heading: Punjab Health Department House Surgeon Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: The Health & Family Welfare Department, Punjab, Chandigarh has issued Recruitment Notice Reference No. E4/(4)/pb./2026/3954 dated 07-07-2026 for the post of House Surgeon. The recruitment is being carried out under the National Health Mission (NHM) Punjab, and candidates must apply online within the specified window.

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates should keep track of the following key dates to ensure their application is submitted within the online window and to plan for the subsequent counselling process. Notification Date: 07-07-2026 Online Application Start Date: 10-07-2026 Online Application Last Date: 26-07-2026 (till midnight) Counselling Date: 28-07-2026

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The Punjab Health Department has announced a total of 523 vacancies for the post of House Surgeon in this recruitment cycle. The notice does not provide a category-wise or district-wise breakup of these posts.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: The official notice does not specify an age limit for the House Surgeon post. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification on the official website once released for confirmed age criteria.

content_sections.heading: Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized medical college, have completed the compulsory rotatory internship, hold a valid registration with either the Punjab Medical Council (PMC) or the National Medical Commission (NMC), and provide proof of proficiency in the Punjabi language.

content_sections.heading: Exam Pattern & Selection Process
content_sections.text: The notice indicates that a counselling process will be held on 28-07-2026 following the online application window, suggesting selection may be counselling-based. However, no detailed exam pattern or selection methodology has been announced.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee details for this recruitment have not been announced in the official notice. Candidates should check the official website for fee information once it is updated.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates can apply for the House Surgeon post through the official NHM Punjab website within the specified application window. Visit the official website: https://nhm.punjab.gov.in Locate the House Surgeon Recruitment 2026 notification link. Register with the required personal details. Fill in the online application form carefully. Upload the necessary documents as specified. Submit the form before 26-07-2026 (midnight) and retain a printout for reference.

content_sections.heading: Other Important Eligibility Conditions
content_sections.text: Candidates should note that any updates, corrigenda, or additional eligibility information related to this recruitment will be published only on the official NHM Punjab website. No other source should be treated as authoritative. Applications must be submitted online only within the given window. Counselling for shortlisted/eligible candidates is scheduled for 28-07-2026. Any recruitment-related updates will be published exclusively on https://nhm.punjab.gov.in

faq.question: Q1. How many House Surgeon positions are available in Punjab DHFW Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 523 House Surgeon posts are available in the Punjab DHFW House Surgeon Recruitment 2026. These positions will be filled across various government hospitals and medical institutions in Punjab.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for House Surgeon in Punjab DHFW 2026?
faq.answer: The monthly salary for House Surgeon position is Rs. 70,000/- per month. Additional allowances and benefits will be provided as per Government of Punjab norms.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for Punjab DHFW House Surgeon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting online applications is 26/07/2026 (excluding holidays). Candidates are advised to apply before the deadline to avoid any issues.

faq.question: Q4. When is the written examination for DHFW House Surgeon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The written examination for House Surgeon positions is scheduled on 28/07/2026. Exact timing and examination center details will be provided on the admit card and official website.

faq.question: Q5. What are the eligibility criteria for DHFW House Surgeon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Bachelor of Medicine, Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) degree from a recognized medical university and valid medical registration with the National Medical Commission (NMC). Detailed eligibility criteria will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is medical registration with NMC mandatory for House Surgeon position?
faq.answer: Yes, valid medical registration with the National Medical Commission (NMC) or Medical Council of India (MCI) is mandatory to apply for the House Surgeon position in Punjab DHFW.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for Punjab DHFW House Surgeon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official NHM Punjab website at https://nhm.punjab.gov.in. Visit the recruitment section, find the House Surgeon post, and click "Apply Online" to fill and submit your application.
